
::: {.column-screen .nav-bar}
[🏠 Home](00-overview.html) |
[💬 ChatGPT](chatgpt.html) |
[🧠 Claude](claude-ai.html) |
[♊ Gemini](gemini.html) |
[📓 NotebookLM](notebooklm.html) |
[🔍 Perplexity](perplexity.html) |
[🌊 Qwen](qwen.html) |
[🐉 DeepSeek](deepseek.html) |
[⌨️ Claude Code](claude-code.html) |
[🤖 Codex](codex.html) |
[📟 Gemini CLI](gemini-cli.html)
:::

<style>
.nav-bar {
    background: #f8f9fa;
    padding: 12px 20px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    font-size: 0.85em;
    text-align: center;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 10px;
    font-family: var(--bs-font-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif);
}
.nav-bar a {
    color: #495057;
    text-decoration: none;
    padding: 2px 8px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s;
    white-space: nowrap;
}
.nav-bar a:hover {
    background: rgba(116, 170, 156, 0.1);
    color: #74AA9C;
}
</style>
